story.iWant: query handlers that retrieve Widget data from projections
story.soThat: read operations are fast and don't load full event history

tasks.task: Write unit tests with Nullable Pattern
Write integration test: command → projection → query
Commit: "Add Widget query handlers with cursor pagination"

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Queries implemented: FindWidgetQuery (by ID), ListWidgetsQuery (with cursor pagination)
Query handlers use jOOQ for type-safe SQL queries on widget_view
Unit tests with Nullable Pattern for query logic
Integration test validates: store events → query returns projected data
Query performance <50ms for single widget, <200ms for paginated list

doc.title: Product Requirements Document
doc.snippet: Query handlers retrieve data from projections (not event history). Query performance <50ms single, <200ms paginated list. Cursor-based pagination (no offset).

doc.title: Decision Architecture
doc.snippet: @QueryHandler methods on @Component classes. jOOQ for type-safe projection queries. Cursor-based pagination (created_at + limit + hasMore). Response DTOs separate from domain.

doc.title: Epic 2 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: FindWidgetQuery and ListWidgetsQuery. WidgetQueryHandler with @QueryHandler. jOOQ type-safe queries. Cursor pagination. Nullable Pattern unit tests. Performance <50ms / <200ms.

doc.title: Test Strategy
doc.snippet: Fast query handler unit tests. Stub dependencies (no database). Focus on business logic validation. 100-1000x performance improvement over integration baseline.

constraints.constraint: Use Nullable Pattern for unit tests (not Testcontainers)
Fetch limit+1 to determine hasMore flag

pattern.name: Query Handler Pattern
Cursor Pagination Pattern
pattern.code:
val widgets = dsl.selectFrom(WIDGET_VIEW) .where(cursor?.let { WIDGET_VIEW.CREATED_AT.lt(it.timestamp) } ?: noCondition()) .orderBy(WIDGET_VIEW.CREATED_AT.desc()) .limit(query.limit + 1) // Fetch one extra to check hasMore .fetchInto(WidgetProjection::class.java)
val hasMore = widgets.size > query.limit val items = if (hasMore) widgets.take(query.limit) else widgets

standards.unitApproach: Nullable Pattern for fast query logic tests

ideas.idea: Test FindWidgetQuery DTO exists with widgetId field
Test ListWidgetsQuery DTO exists with limit and cursor fields
Integration test: FindWidgetQuery uses jOOQ selectFrom(WIDGET_VIEW)
Integration test: ListWidgetsQuery uses jOOQ with orderBy and limit
Test hasMore flag is true when results exceed limit
Unit test: FindWidgetQuery with Nullable DSLContext
Unit test: ListWidgetsQuery with Nullable DSLContext
Unit test: cursor pagination logic (no database)
Integration test: dispatch CreateWidgetCommand → query returns projection
Integration test: verify projected data matches command data
Performance test: measure FindWidgetQuery execution time (<50ms)
Performance test: measure ListWidgetsQuery execution time (<200ms)
